leaders.name: Rieri
leaders.quote: Good things come to those who wait. Great things come to those who fish.

leaders.name: Jejejer
leaders.quote: I let my Pokémon do the talking.

leaders.name: Scchizo

leaders.name: Kaori
leaders.quote: Why settle for standard when you can afford to sparkle?

leaders.name: Ruiner
leaders.quote: I don't play the meta. I fund it.

teamRules: Respect the PokeMMO Terms of Service at all times. No botting, cheating or RMT.
Maintain a professional attitude in Global and Channel chats.
Respect their authority and comply with their warnings immediately.
Do not scam other trainers. Fair play is expected at all times.
Treat fellow members with kindness and respect.
requirements: A positive attitude and willingness to learn
